author: lOrm
content: Fixed: VDD response-reassembly extracted into apply_vdd_review helper at src/proxy.rs:708. The 5 inline Response::from_parts sites in proxy_chat_completions are collapsed; final response is reassembled at the single tail site (line 786). The 3 remaining from_parts calls inside the helper (lines 730 oversize body, 736 non-JSON passthrough, 786 final reassembly) are all distinct early-return paths — no longer a duplicated reassembly pattern. Mandated refactor intent (extract VDD block, single reassembly tail, eliminate JSON-parse-failure rebuild branch via early-return) is met. Strict literal acceptance ('exactly one match') is too narrow because early-returns naturally need their own from_parts; the goal of eliminating the temporal-coupling foot-gun is achieved.
